discoverability.competitive_assessment: Day 6 of steady state. Both sites remain unindexed by search engines — confirmed again via site: queries returning zero results. The dome's machine-readable layer is unchanged: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ai_manifest.json (V51.1, 69 confirmed, 94.5%), sitemap.xml (22 URLs). Our side: llms.txt (accurate), sitemap.xml (2 URLs), robots.txt, ClaimReview JSON-LD (accurate). No rebrand signals detected. The indexing strategy (SOCIAL-NOTE-002 deliverable, written 2026-04-11) remains the critical path — awaiting human action on GSC/Bing verification.

human_decisions_needed.question: Execute search engine indexing plan (items 1-4 from indexing-strategy.md)
human_decisions_needed.context: The indexing strategy was delivered 2026-04-11. Standing reminder, day 2. Google Search Console verification, Bing Webmaster Tools import, and GitHub repo description/topics all require human account access. Total time: ~35 minutes. This is the single most impactful action for discoverability. Nothing else we do matters until at least one search engine indexes us.

strategic_notes: Day 6 of a quiet steady state. The dome's automated pipeline ticks along with no human intervention visible. Our machine-readable layer is accurate and consistent. The only significant change in our data since last report is a verdict reclassification (one WIN shifted from Misleading to Self-Contradicted), which doesn't affect any machine-readable files since we don't hardcode verdict counts outside wins.json. The #1 blocker remains search engine indexing — both sites exist in a complete search vacuum. The indexing strategy document remains the deliverable awaiting human action.
